response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company name] experienced a decline in revenue or profits during the specified period.  
2. [Company name] saw a decrease in earnings per share during the specified period.  
3. [Company name] faced a decline in stock prices during the specified period.  
4. [Company name] relies heavily on a single product or service.  
5. [Company name] increased its liabilities during the specified period.  
6. [Company name] encountered challenges in production or output due to external factors.  
7. [Company name] has no offerings in a particular area or product line.  
8. [Company name] depends on a limited number of large customers.  
9. [Company name] faces legal or regulatory issues during the specified period.  
10. [Company name] is under investigation or faces pending legal actions.
